title: Past Simple
explanation_en: Use the Past Simple for something that started and finished in the past. Step 1: Find the past-time signal. Step 2: Use the past form of the action word. Example: I played football yesterday.
explanation_zh: 過去簡單式表示在過去開始並已經完成的事情。第一步：找出表示過去時間的提示詞。第二步：使用動詞的過去式。例如：I played football yesterday.（我昨天踢了足球。）

spelling_rules.rule: If a verb ends in e, add -d.
For some short verbs, double the last letter and add -ed.
Some verbs have a special past form.

common_mistakes.wrong: I go to the park yesterday.
common_mistakes.correct: I went to the park yesterday.

examples.english: I played football yesterday.
examples.chinese: 我昨天踢了足球。
examples.reason_cn: yesterday 表示事情在昨天已經完成。

examples.english: Mum cooked dinner last night.
examples.chinese: 媽媽昨晚煮了晚餐。
examples.reason_cn: last night 表示事情在昨晚已經完成。

examples.english: Amy danced at the school show yesterday.
examples.chinese: Amy 昨天在學校表演中跳舞。
examples.reason_cn: dance 以 e 結尾，過去式加 d。

examples.english: Ben studied English last night.
examples.chinese: Ben 昨晚溫習了英文。
examples.reason_cn: study 的過去式是 studied。

examples.english: The bus stopped here an hour ago.
examples.chinese: 巴士一小時前在這裏停下來。
examples.reason_cn: stop 的過去式是 stopped。

examples.english: We visited Grandma last weekend.
examples.chinese: 我們上週末探望了祖母。
examples.reason_cn: last weekend 表示事情在上週末已經完成。

examples.english: Dad washed the car yesterday morning.
examples.chinese: 爸爸昨天早上洗了車。
examples.reason_cn: yesterday morning 表示事情在昨天早上已經完成。

examples.english: My sister cleaned her desk yesterday.
examples.chinese: 我姐姐昨天清潔了她的書桌。
examples.reason_cn: clean 的過去式是 cleaned。

examples.english: They watched a film last night.
examples.chinese: 他們昨晚看了一齣電影。
examples.reason_cn: watch 的過去式是 watched。

examples.english: The children planted flowers last week.
examples.chinese: 孩子們上星期種了花。
examples.reason_cn: last week 表示事情在上星期已經完成。

examples.english: I went to the library yesterday.
examples.chinese: 我昨天去了圖書館。
examples.reason_cn: go 的過去式是不規則變化 went。

examples.english: She ate a sandwich at lunchtime yesterday.
examples.chinese: 她昨天午飯時吃了一份三文治。
examples.reason_cn: eat 的過去式是不規則變化 ate。

examples.english: We saw a rainbow yesterday afternoon.
examples.chinese: 我們昨天下午看見一道彩虹。
examples.reason_cn: see 的過去式是不規則變化 saw。

examples.english: Tom drank some water after PE yesterday.
examples.chinese: Tom 昨天上體育課後喝了一些水。
examples.reason_cn: drink 的過去式是不規則變化 drank。

examples.english: My friend gave me a birthday card last week.
examples.chinese: 我的朋友上星期送了我一張生日卡。
examples.reason_cn: give 的過去式是不規則變化 gave。

examples.english: I did not use the computer last night.
examples.chinese: 我昨晚沒有使用電腦。
examples.reason_cn: 否定句用 did not 加動詞原形 use。

examples.english: She did not bring her umbrella yesterday.
examples.chinese: 她昨天沒有帶雨傘。
examples.reason_cn: 否定句用 did not 加動詞原形 bring。

examples.english: We did not have homework last weekend.
examples.chinese: 我們上週末沒有功課。
examples.reason_cn: 否定句用 did not 加動詞原形 have。

examples.english: Dad did not drive to work yesterday.
examples.chinese: 爸爸昨天沒有駕車上班。
examples.reason_cn: 否定句用 did not 加動詞原形 drive。

examples.english: The shop did not open yesterday morning.
examples.chinese: 那間商店昨天早上沒有開門。
examples.reason_cn: 否定句用 did not 加動詞原形 open。

examples.english: Did you finish your homework last night?
examples.chinese: 你昨晚完成了功課嗎？
examples.reason_cn: 一般疑問句用 Did 加主語和動詞原形 finish。

examples.english: Did Amy walk to school yesterday?
examples.chinese: Amy 昨天步行上學嗎？
examples.reason_cn: 一般疑問句用 Did 加主語和動詞原形 walk。

examples.english: Did they win the match last week?
examples.chinese: 他們上星期贏了比賽嗎？
examples.reason_cn: Did 後面的動詞使用原形 win。

examples.english: What did you eat yesterday?
examples.chinese: 你昨天吃了甚麼？
examples.reason_cn: 特殊疑問句用疑問詞、did、主語和動詞原形。

examples.english: Where did Dad put the keys last night?
examples.chinese: 爸爸昨晚把鎖匙放在哪裏？
examples.reason_cn: Did 後面的動詞使用原形 put。

examples.english: I borrowed two books from the library three days ago.
examples.chinese: 我三天前從圖書館借了兩本書。
examples.reason_cn: three days ago 表示事情在三天前已經完成。

examples.english: Our class made a poster last week.
examples.chinese: 我們班上星期製作了一張海報。
examples.reason_cn: make 的過去式是不規則變化 made。

examples.english: The rain started two hours ago.
examples.chinese: 雨在兩小時前開始下。
examples.reason_cn: two hours ago 表示事情在兩小時前發生。

examples.english: My family had dim sum last Sunday.
examples.chinese: 我的家人上星期日吃了點心。
examples.reason_cn: have 的過去式是不規則變化 had。

examples.english: I found my library card yesterday afternoon.
examples.chinese: 我昨天下午找到了圖書證。
examples.reason_cn: find 的過去式是不規則變化 found。

optional_extension.title: Useful Irregular Verbs
optional_extension.explanation_en: Some verbs do not use -ed. Learn their special past forms a few at a time.
optional_extension.explanation_zh: 有些動詞的過去式不加 -ed。每次學習幾個特別的過去式便可以了。

examples.english: go → went
examples.chinese: 去

examples.english: eat → ate
examples.chinese: 吃

examples.english: see → saw
examples.chinese: 看見

examples.english: have → had
examples.chinese: 有／吃

quiz.question: We ___ to the library last Saturday.
She did not ___ TV last night.

practice.question: I ___ (play) badminton yesterday.
She ___ (dance) at the show last night.
We ___ (study) Chinese yesterday.
The bus ___ (stop) here an hour ago.
Tom ___ (go) to the park last Sunday.
Mum ___ a cake yesterday.
The children ___ lunch at school yesterday.
I ___ my friend last weekend.
Dad did not ___ the car yesterday.
Did Amy ___ her homework?
Change to negative: He played basketball yesterday.
Change to negative: We visited the museum last week.
Change to a question: Lily cleaned her room yesterday.
Change to a question: They went home after school.
Put in order: yesterday / I / my bike / rode
Put in order: last night / did / what / you / eat / ?
Correct the sentence: She goed to school yesterday.
Correct the sentence: I did not watched TV.
Correct the sentence: Did he played football?
Translate into English: 我們上星期去了圖書館。

answer_key.answer: He did not play basketball yesterday.
We did not visit the museum last week.
Did Lily clean her room yesterday?
Did they go home after school?
What did you eat last night?
We went to the library last week.
